creator: alex.deiter@gmail.com
text:
Dear All,

Thanks a lot for maintainer-update available in ports/141799!

But could you please recheck your patch ?

1. new version of igmpproxy required startup parameter - configfile:

# igmpproxy
You must specify the configuration file.

# igmpproxy -h
Usage: igmpproxy [-h] [-d] [-v [-v]] <configfile>

   -h   Display this help screen
   -d   Run in debug mode. Output all messages on stderr
   -v   Be verbose. Give twice to see even debug messages.

igmpproxy 0.1

but igmpproxy.in file has not been changed properly!

2. new version of igmpproxy at the start does not become a demon -
patch for daemon(3) is required!

Thanks a lot!

2010/1/3  <linimon@freebsd.org>:
> Synopsis: [PATCH] net/igmpproxy: update up to 0.1 release from 0.1 beta2
>
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->closed
> State-Changed-By: linimon
> State-Changed-When: Sun Jan 3 07:44:56 UTC 2010
> State-Changed-Why:
> There is a already a maintainer-update available in ports/141799,
> but thanks for the submission.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=142220
>
